ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station (in meters) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "est" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "max_temperature_f" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_temperature_f" REAL /* Mean temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_temperature_f" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_dew_point_f" REAL /* Maximum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "mean_dew_point_f" REAL /* Mean dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "min_dew_point_f" REAL /* Minimum dew point in Fahrenheit */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in inches */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in millibars */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in miles */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Snow depth in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the weather condition */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the weather condition (for visualization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that recorded the event */,
  "est" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition associated with the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "impact_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the event */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the prediction model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (e.g., in percentage) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction model used to make the prediction */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the prediction is for */,
  "est" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted weather condition */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the prediction */,
  "actual_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actual weather condition that occurred (for comparison with predictions) */,
  "error_margin" REAL /* Margin of error in the prediction */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert based on the prediction (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_actual_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("actual_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
